label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Steam Privacy Agreement through mid-2025. Notable: Valve is relatively privacy-protective compared to peers; no ads, no data sales. However, extensive gameplay tracking occurs. Steam Guard is strong security feature. Account deletion possible but game licenses not transferable. Large adult user base reduces child safety concerns vs competitors.
